steps.title: Factor and set up the no-solution condition
steps.content:
Factor the left side:
$$-6x+42px=(-6+42p)x$$
The equation is $(-6+42p)x=84$. Since $84\ne0$, no solution happens only when the $x$-coefficient is $0$, producing the false statement $0=84$.

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content:
Set the coefficient equal to $0$:
$$-6+42p=0$$
$$42p=6$$
$$p=\frac{1}{7}$$
That matches Choice D — $\frac{1}{7}$.
